Description: A large shopping mall located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 68.3 m (east-west) by 68.3 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 135 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 14000.0 m^2 spread over 3 floor(s), giving roughly 4666.7 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 5.2 m. The building is divided into 24 thermal zones in total (about 8 per floor). Typical space layout: per floor: anchor store + multiple shop units + central atrium + food court + restrooms. Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 40% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
